text.title: Creative Brief Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree routes by campaign type to determine required fields and the rule from 01-core-rules.xml that gates the brief.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all required input artefacts (ICP, proof, brand voice) available and citable?

conclusion.verdict: STOP — request missing inputs before drafting

branch.question: Is a single named owner with a handle available?

conclusion.verdict: all fields required incl. CPL target; trace every angle to ICP source
all fields required; proof must include conversion-rate claim
audience pinned to a retargeting list ID; angle traces to prior interaction
proof field may be brand metrics; CTA may be soft (newsletter, follow); version + date still required

text.example: inputs_available=true → owner_named=true → type=lead-gen → traceable-decision → fill all fields; each cites a pinned input.
